commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens bundled plugin generated-entry, dist-runtime channel root, package-state probe, and public artifact path resolution with regression tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main searches generated entries in dist/source only, resolves package-state probes from entry.rootDir, and lacks dist-runtime channel boundary roots. Those paths match the linked reports https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/78462 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/75797, though I did not run a live gateway cold-start.
commands.review_followup: Draft protected maintainer PR needs human owner/security review and fresh green checks; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair finding to hand to automation.
